subHeadline: A permanent, categorised reference — not symptom-chasing blog posts. Every entry links to a full breakdown of symptoms, root cause, mileage window, repair cost, and replacement cost.

rows.title: 276DT Oil Pump Housing Failure
rows.description: Shared with Land Rover — often kills the engine outright before any other symptom appears. Fitted to XF X250 and XJ X351.

rows.title: AJ133 Pre-2013 Timing Chain Tensioner Wear
rows.description: The 5.0 V8's early-build weak point — chain tensioner design was revised in 2013 with a marked reliability improvement.

rows.title: AJ200D / 204DTD Ingenium Timing Chain
rows.description: Same engine, same issue as Land Rover's Ingenium diesel — pre-2019 tensioner wear, improved from 2019 onward.

rows.title: AJ126 Cooling System & Plastic Crossover Pipe Failure
rows.description: Well-documented weak point — plastic coolant pipes crack with age, and these engines cannot tolerate overheating without head-gasket damage.

rows.title: Air Suspension Compressor Failure
rows.description: The most common air suspension complaint across XJ, XF and F-Pace. Burnout presents a fire risk.

rows.title: Height Sensor Faults
rows.description: Trigger warning lights and uneven ride height well before a full system failure. £200–£500 repair cost.

rows.title: Valve Block & Air Spring Leaks
rows.description: Slow leaks often mistaken for compressor failure. £300–£800 repair cost.

rows.title: ZF 8-Speed Gearbox Faults
rows.description: Shared across the JLR range — mechatronic unit and torque converter issues are the most common cause.

rows.title: Supercharger Coupler / Torsion Isolator Rattle
rows.description: A well-known shared quirk of the AJ126 and AJ133 — rattly but rarely catastrophic on its own.

rows.title: X-Type Driveshaft & CV Joint Wear
rows.description: A legacy of the Ford Mondeo-derived platform — most common on early (pre-2007) cars.

rows.title: Infotainment & Software Glitches
rows.description: Particularly common on pre-2018 Touch Pro systems. Usually resolved with a software update.

rows.title: Battery Drain / Parasitic Drain
rows.description: Modules failing to sleep correctly — a frequent no-start complaint.

rows.title: X-Type Era Electrical Gremlins
rows.description: Window regulators, central locking modules and connector corrosion — the source of Jaguar's older 'electrical' reputation.

rows.title: Air Suspension Compressor Failure
rows.description: The most common air suspension complaint across XJ, XF and F-Pace. Burnout presents a fire risk.

rows.title: ZF 8-Speed Gearbox Faults
rows.description: Shared across the JLR range — mechatronic unit and torque converter issues are the most common cause.

rows.title: Infotainment & Software Glitches
rows.description: Particularly common on pre-2018 Touch Pro systems. Usually resolved with a software update.

rows.title: Battery Drain / Parasitic Drain
rows.description: Modules failing to sleep correctly — a frequent no-start complaint.
